pr.title: Match 13 misc functions (gr, it, ft, gm, if)
pr.author: johnwinston

summary: PR #2326 replaced 13 misc decomp stubs across stage, item, fighter, game-mode, and interface code with C implementations, added related struct fields/prototypes/includes, and used a scoped dont_inline pragma for soundtest un_802FFCD0. The PR body claims all functions matched via objdiff; the loaded bot report from an early commit shows two 100% new matches, many high-percent improvements, and two small data-section regressions, so final verification evidence is mixed in this slice.

key_files.role: Implemented fn_800F98F4 for Kirby Luigi-copy fireball spawn/effect and added itluigifireball include.
Implemented fn_80122B54 for Ice Climbers Blizzard landing transition, callbacks, and foot slope rotation.
Implemented fn_80168A6C as a CSS data-copy helper using a temporary anonymous source struct and flat output buffer writes.
Recovered fields in lbl_80472D28_t, added RegClearEv, and implemented fn_8017FE54 for grade reveal/fill computation.
Updated fn_8017FE54 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_8017FE54(HSD_GObj*).
Implemented grHomeRun_8021EA30 distance calculation and added lblanguage include plus grHr globals.
Updated grHomeRun_8021EA30 prototype to void grHomeRun_8021EA30(f32*).
Implemented grRCruise_80200B48 loop initializing 17 Rainbow Cruise platform entries.
Updated grRCruise_80200B48 prototype to void grRCruise_80200B48(Ground_GObj*).
Added YorsterParams typing and implemented grYorster_80202428 to update fighter float state and cloud track element sag.
Updated grYorster_80202428 prototype with typed arguments.
Added grYorster_TrackElement and extended grYorster_GroundVars with elements[9].
Implemented un_802FFCD0 as a simple fill loop and wrapped it in #pragma dont_inline on/reset.
Recovered additional itKyasarinAttributes fields at xC, x30, and x34.
Implemented itClimbersice_UnkMotion2_Phys and Coll for damage scaling by velocity and collision deflection/lifetime adjustment.
Implemented it_802F0F6C spawn helper and replaced placeholder include with db/db.h.
Updated it_802F0F6C prototype from unknown to typed spawn helper signature.
Implemented itKyasarin_UnkMotion2_Coll boundary check and turn-around transition logic.
Implemented it_802EB5C8 Tingle motion reset and balloon height calculation using a bone world position and ABS.
Updated it_802EB6DC prototype to void it_802EB6DC(Item_GObj*).

what_changed: Replaced function stubs for 13 named functions across gr, it, ft, gm, and if with C implementations.
Updated several headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed prototypes where function bodies proved signatures.
Recovered small local or shared type surfaces, including grYorster_TrackElement, YorsterParams, RegClearEv, lbl_80472D28_t fields, and itKyasarinAttributes fields.
Used loops for repeated platform initialization, cloud-element search, soundtest array fill, and flat data copy instead of leaving generated-looking repeated code.
Added a scoped #pragma dont_inline on/reset around un_802FFCD0, with PR-body rationale that MWCC otherwise inlined it into callers.
Added includes needed by recovered bodies, including itluigifireball.h, ftlib.h, lb/lblanguage.h, lb_00B0.h, MSL/math.h, and db/db.h.

smart_moves.text: The soundtest fill helper was expressed as a compact for loop and the pragma was tightly scoped around only that helper.
The Rainbow Cruise initializer used a natural counted loop over 17 entries and retained typed entry access through gp->gv.rcruise.entries.
Several stubs were paired with owning-header prototype updates rather than leaving unknown declarations after recovering bodies.
Item and ground data access was improved by adding narrowly scoped struct fields instead of relying only on raw offsets.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a repeated helper is at risk of MWCC inlining into callers, a tightly scoped dont_inline pragma can be used as a matching tactic, but it should carry explicit rationale and verification.
Recovered function bodies should update owning headers to remove UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when the signature is evident from the implementation.
Small temporary structs or recovered field declarations can make decompiled data access more reviewable, but address-style or unknown field names should remain when semantics are not proven.
Natural for loops are appropriate for fixed-count table/array work when the repeated work varies by index, such as 17 Rainbow Cruise entries, 9 Yorster elements, or soundtest fill slots.

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names such as fn_800F98F4, fn_80122B54, fn_80168A6C, and it_802F0F6C were retained where semantic names were not established by the PR evidence.
Local role names fp, ip, gp, gobj, pos, bone, attr, sa, and ev were used where object roles were clear.
Recovered-but-not-semantic fields kept offset-style names such as x2C, x10C, x110, x14, x4, x1C, x30, and x34.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped #pragma dont_inline around un_802FFCD0 to prevent MWCC from inlining it into callers.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Pragma exceptions can perturb neighboring codegen; this slice only includes PR-body rationale and a bot report for the early commit, not adjacent-function final verification.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in fn_800F98F4, fn_80122B54, and grHomeRun_8021EA30.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic requiring objdiff evidence; the PR body claims all functions 100% match, but the loaded bot report shows some functions below 100% at the reported commit.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used ABS macro/expression forms for Tingle balloon distance and Ice Climbers ice damage/collision velocity handling.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: The ice collision function also manually normalizes velocity with a branch; no review discussion explains alternative macro choices.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed prototype/header updates alongside implementations to satisfy truthful signature recovery.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: No require-protos output is loaded in this slice.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Initial report for GALE01 af6792b..747c9ab showed matched code +384 bytes, two new 100% matches, sixteen improvements in unmatched items, and two small data-section regressions.
No human review comments or review records are present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: PR 2326 final objdiff all functions 100% match
un_802FFCD0 dont_inline MWCC inlining callers soundtest
fn_80168A6C CSS data copy struct x0 x4 x8 xC

notes: Changed files, function names, code bodies, prototypes, and struct field edits are strongly supported by the loaded diff and changed_files metadata.

PR body claims 'All functions 100% match via objdiff', but the loaded bot report for commit range af6792b..747c9ab shows only two new 100% matches, many high-percent but sub-100 improvements, and two data-section regressions. The slice does not include later bot reports or final per-function objdiff output, so final verification should not be treated as independently proven here.
No human review comments are loaded, so reviewer intent or acceptance rationale cannot be inferred beyond merge metadata.
The PR body explains the dont_inline rationale for un_802FFCD0, but no adjacent-caller objdiff evidence is loaded.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep pragma matching exceptions tightly scoped and evidence-backed
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2326 used #pragma dont_inline on/reset only around un_802FFCD0, with PR-body rationale that MWCC otherwise inlined the helper into callers. Curators may preserve this as an example of a narrow pragma exception, not a general style endorsement.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered bodies should update owning headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR updated prototypes in gmregclear.h, grhomerun.h, grrcruise.h, gryorster.h, itcrazyhandbomb.h, and ittincle.h after replacing stubs with typed implementations.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer natural loops for fixed-count table initialization/search/fill
accepted_candidate_records.text: The matched implementations used ordinary for loops for a 17-entry Rainbow Cruise initialization, 9-entry Yorster element search, and soundtest count-based array fill.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2326 function-to-file mapping for 13 misc matched functions
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate path fact: PR #2326 implemented grRCruise_80200B48 in src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c; it_802EB5C8 in src/melee/it/items/ittincle.c; it_802F0F6C in src/melee/it/items/itcrazyhandbomb.c; itKyasarin_UnkMotion2_Coll in src/melee/it/items/itkyasarin.c; un_802FFCD0 in src/melee/if/soundtest.c; fn_80122B54 in src/melee/ft/chara/ftPopo/ftPp_SpecialS.c; grHomeRun_8021EA30 in src/melee/gr/grhomerun.c; grYorster_80202428 in src/melee/gr/gryorster.c; itClimbersice_UnkMotion2_Phys and itClimbersice_UnkMotion2_Coll in src/melee/it/items/itclimbersice.c; fn_80168A6C in src/melee/gm/gm_1601.c; fn_8017FE54 in src/melee/gm/gmregclear.c; fn_800F98F4 in src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful searchable mapping, but should be curated as a path fact rather than inferred globally.

source_update_candidates.title: Pragma exception examples should include caller-inlining rationale and adjacent verification
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2326 provides an example where a dont_inline pragma was added to prevent MWCC from inlining un_802FFCD0 into callers. Consider adding an example note under avoid-pragmas-register-asm or verification-and-regression-ledger that such pragmas should be scoped tightly and accompanied by caller/adjacent objdiff evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence supports the tactic and rationale, but the loaded slice lacks final adjacent verification; curator should decide whether this warrants a standard example.

source_update_candidates.title: Recovered struct surfaces from PR #2326
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate path fact: PR #2326 added or refined grYorster_TrackElement and grYorster_GroundVars elements[9] in src/melee/gr/types.h; YorsterParams in src/melee/gr/gryorster.c; RegClearEv and fields in lbl_80472D28_t in src/melee/gm/gmregclear.c; and itKyasarinAttributes fields xC, x30, and x34 in src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: These are concrete path/type facts from the diff, but field semantics remain mostly offset-style and should not be over-interpreted.

rejection_notes: Do not promote 'all functions 100% match via objdiff' as a verified final fact from this slice alone because the loaded bot report conflicts with that claim for the reported commit.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not treat PAD_STACK usage in this PR as a general style preference; it is a matching tactic requiring narrow verification.
Do not assign semantic meanings to offset-style fields such as x10C, x110, x30, or x34 beyond the operations shown in the diff.
